title: OpenAI bets on families as ChatGPT goes deeper into households
description: ChatGPT is hiring a dedicated product manager to build experiences for families, caregivers, and older adults, according to a job posting.

title: The New AI Trust Architecture: 5 Requirements for Agent-to-Agent Communication
description: In London in 1832, clerks from thirty-one competing banks gathered every afternoon on Lombard Street to settle accounts. Each bank had already mastered the basics — tracking debits, crediting accounts, settling balances. The…

title: Apple sues OpenAI over alleged trade secret theft
description: Apple alleges the misconduct was directed by OpenAI's senior leadership, including a longtime former employee.

title: Open source AI matters more than ever, according to Hugging Face’s Clem Delangue
description: Open source AI is booming, according to Hugging Face CEO Clem Delangue. The company has grown into something like a GitHub for AI in recent years, where AI builders can share and download open models and datasets, now used by roughly half the Fortune 500. Delangue has seen the same story play out again and again: companies start […]

title: SK Hynix raises $26.5B in the biggest foreign IPO in US history, is urged to build new US fabs
description: The AI chip boom just produced its biggest Wall Street moment yet. Now SK Hynix and Samsung are being asked to build U.S. factories.

title: Fraud fight can’t wait on government
description: “While we wait for federal roundtable policies to trickle down, merchants are suffering heavily right now,” writes one industry consultant.

title: New Dashboard Tool Lets You Monitor Claude Usage
description: The generative AI vendor is aiming to counter dependence on and overuse of its popular model.

title: How GPT-5.6 Reflects the New AI Regulation
description: The release shows the power the U.S. government now holds in the AI model landscape. ChatGPT Work highlights how OpenAI continues to evolve into an enterprise vendor.

title: Prompt: AI's Next Challenge Is Making Better Use of Compute
description: After years spent racing to secure AI chips and computing power, enterprise leaders are discovering that getting access to infrastructure might be easier than using it effectively.

title: Web3 Commerce Boom: E-Commerce Sales Surge Creates New Opportunities and Challenges for Digital Marketplaces
description:
Sponsor content is created on behalf of and in collaboration with Bazoom by DigitalCommerce360. Our editorial staff is not involved in the creation of the sponsored content. E-commerce has changed the way people buy and sell. Digital marketplaces offer a way to reach different customers and a way to deal with new complications that traditional […]
The post Web3 Commerce Boom: E-Commerce Sales Surge Creates New Opportunities and Challenges for Digital Marketplaces appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.

title: Protecting Your Work as AI Models Rapidly Come and Go
description: Marketers, beware: The AI model you rely on today might not be the one you can rely on tomorrow.

title: Anthropic found a hidden space where Claude puzzles over concepts
description: The AI firm Anthropic has developed a technique that has given it the clearest glimpse yet at what’s really going on inside large language models as they answer questions or carry out tasks. What they found ranges from the mundane to the unnerving. Researchers at the company built a tool called the Jacobian lens (or…

title: Sociable: Meta adds updated disclosure tags for AI-generated ads
description: The updated tags will provide more info on which promotions include AI-generated elements, whether from Meta or via external AI tools.

title: Why unpaid media is now essential to AI visibility
description: Earned media and community discussion generate the authority signals that determine whether a brand gets recommended by AI, writes Abigail Niziankiewicz of Mediassociates.

title: [AINews] SpaceXAI launches Grok 4.5, first Opus-class model post Cursor acquisition
description: SpaceXAI continues to move faster than any other frontier lab on earth.
